LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EUROPEAN DESIGNS CENTER, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT EUROPEAN DESIGN CENTER, INC.'S ("EDC") MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT RELATED TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES, WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT EDC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT RELATED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EUROPEAN DESIGNS CENTER, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

The Court GRANTS Defendant European Design Center, Inc.'s ("EDC") motion to strike portions of the complaint related to punitive damages, with 20 days leave to amend.

The Court DENIES Defendant EDC's motion to strike portions of the complaint related to attorney's fees. (see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party to prepare a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
